TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lingacay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 223 buwan, 741 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 700 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 41 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 89%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lingacay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Lingacay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lingacay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lingacay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lingacay hya' ga Satefo. tay mkyahu' na Lingacay hya' ga Ceroh. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ liŋaʦ~ʨaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕate*o. taj mkjaħuʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨeroħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lingacay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Buri go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 223 buwan, 741 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 700 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 41 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 89%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 4%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lingacay hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Lingacay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lingacay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lingacay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Lingacay hya' ga Satefo. tay mkyahu' na Lingacay hya' ga Ceroh. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ liŋaʦ~ʨaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu βuri ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj ʔzil na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕate*o. taj mkjaħuʔ na liŋaʦ~ʨaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨeroħ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
